\section*{3. 体重目标进度计算}

\begin{itemize}
\item [x] 3.1 实现体重目标进度计算函数

\begin{itemize}
\item 减重: (startWeight - currentWeight) / (startWeight - targetWeight) * 100
\item 增肌: (currentWeight - startWeight) / (targetWeight - startWeight) * 100
\item \emph{Requirements: 1.2, 3.3}
\end{itemize}
\item [ ]* 3.2 编写体重目标进度属性测试

\begin{itemize}
\item \textbf{Property 7: Weight Goal Progress Calculation}
\item \textbf{Validates: Requirements 1.2, 3.3}
\end{itemize}
\end{itemize}
